news.title:
Amber Enterprises to acquire remaining 50% stake in Amber Resojet.
Deal worth INR 1.74 Cr; Amber Resojet to become wholly owned subsidiary.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises to acquire remaining 50% stake in Amber Resojet.
Deal worth INR 1.74 Cr; Amber Resojet to become wholly owned subsidiary.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises' subsidiary IL JIN acquired a 16.6% stake in MoMagic for Rs. 19.9 Cr.
The acquisition was completed via fresh equity issue on April 3, 2026.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises' subsidiary IL JIN acquired a 16.6% stake in MoMagic for Rs. 19.9 Cr.
The acquisition was completed via fresh equity issue on April 3, 2026.

news.title:
Amber's subsidiary IL JIN acquired 4.85% equity in Unitronics, now holding 49.66%.
Acquisition via ILJIN Holding complies with SEBI rules and prior disclosures.
news.summary:
Amber's subsidiary IL JIN acquired 4.85% equity in Unitronics, now holding 49.66%.
Acquisition via ILJIN Holding complies with SEBI rules and prior disclosures.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises' unit Sidwal sold its 49% stake in Shivaliks Mercantile for Rs. 1.1L.
Shivaliks was fully written off in Dec 2025 and is no longer a JV.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises' unit Sidwal sold its 49% stake in Shivaliks Mercantile for Rs. 1.1L.
Shivaliks was fully written off in Dec 2025 and is no longer a JV.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises executed a Rs. 22.96 Cr block trade on NSE for 36,771 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 6244 each during the transaction.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises executed a Rs. 22.96 Cr block trade on NSE for 36,771 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 6244 each during the transaction.

news.title:
Sharp partners with Amber Enterprises to locally produce ACs in India, targeting 2-3% market share.
Production at Amber's facilities to begin by March 2026, aiming for 5 lakh units in 3 years.
news.summary:
Sharp partners with Amber Enterprises to locally produce ACs in India, targeting 2-3% market share.
Production at Amber's facilities to begin by March 2026, aiming for 5 lakh units in 3 years.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises' unit Il Jin Electronics plans to raise ₹3.28B via rights issue.
DL Invest will hold 51% in JV with Art Games Studio, targeting 25% ROE.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises' unit Il Jin Electronics plans to raise ₹3.28B via rights issue.
DL Invest will hold 51% in JV with Art Games Studio, targeting 25% ROE.

news.title: Jefferies retains 'Buy' rating on Amber Enterprises, revising target price to Rs 9,120.
news.summary: Jefferies retains 'Buy' rating on Amber Enterprises, revising target price to Rs 9,120.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises to participate in a Non-Deal Roadshow on 3rd March 2026 in UAE.
Discussions will be based on public info, no unpublished price-sensitive info shared.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises to participate in a Non-Deal Roadshow on 3rd March 2026 in UAE.
Discussions will be based on public info, no unpublished price-sensitive info shared.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises' subsidiary IL JIN gained majority control over Stelltek by amending a joint venture agreement, effective February 2026.
Stelltek, a smart electronics manufacturer, becomes a step-down subsidiary of Amber, aligning with its strategic business objectives.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises' subsidiary IL JIN gained majority control over Stelltek by amending a joint venture agreement, effective February 2026.
Stelltek, a smart electronics manufacturer, becomes a step-down subsidiary of Amber, aligning with its strategic business objectives.

news.title:
ICRA assigned credit ratings to Amber's subsidiaries, IL JIN and Ascent Circuits.
The ratings cover Rs. 300 crore working capital and term loan facilities with stable outlook.
news.summary:
ICRA assigned credit ratings to Amber's subsidiaries, IL JIN and Ascent Circuits.
The ratings cover Rs. 300 crore working capital and term loan facilities with stable outlook.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises' subsidiary IL JIN to acquire 20% in MoMagic for Rs. 25 Cr.
MoMagic specializes in wireless modules; deal strengthens IL JIN's IoT presence by June 2026.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises' subsidiary IL JIN to acquire 20% in MoMagic for Rs. 25 Cr.
MoMagic specializes in wireless modules; deal strengthens IL JIN's IoT presence by June 2026.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises is cautious about commodity price hikes and currency depreciation.
The company expects 13–15% growth in its consumer durables division for FY.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises is cautious about commodity price hikes and currency depreciation.
The company expects 13–15% growth in its consumer durables division for FY.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises executed NSE block trade for 38,266 shares at Rs. 7,236.
Trade totaled Rs. 27.7 crores, highlighting significant activity for Amber Enterprises.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises executed NSE block trade for 38,266 shares at Rs. 7,236.
Trade totaled Rs. 27.7 crores, highlighting significant activity for Amber Enterprises.

news.title: Amber Enterprises India posted Q3 revenue of 29.4B INR, up from 21.33B INR YoY.
news.summary: Amber Enterprises India posted Q3 revenue of 29.4B INR, up from 21.33B INR YoY.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises reported Q3 & 9M FY26 results: revenue up 29%, PAT up 26%.
Operating EBITDA margins improved to 7.6%-8.4%, with expansion via acquisitions and land allotments.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises reported Q3 & 9M FY26 results: revenue up 29%, PAT up 26%.
Operating EBITDA margins improved to 7.6%-8.4%, with expansion via acquisitions and land allotments.

news.title:
Budget 2026 boosts manufacturing with measures for electronics, pharma, textiles, and capital goods. ECMS outlay rises to ₹40,000 cr to reduce import reliance.
Amber Enterprises, Kaynes Tech stocks rise 2-5% on NSE; Dixon Tech dips 2%. ISM 2.0, tax exemptions, and MSME equity fund also announced.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 boosts manufacturing with measures for electronics, pharma, textiles, and capital goods. ECMS outlay rises to ₹40,000 cr to reduce import reliance.
Amber Enterprises, Kaynes Tech stocks rise 2-5% on NSE; Dixon Tech dips 2%. ISM 2.0, tax exemptions, and MSME equity fund also announced.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises' shares rose 188% over three years despite a recent 34% drop.
EPS grew 18% annually, but share prices climbed 42% annually, reflecting market optimism.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises' shares rose 188% over three years despite a recent 34% drop.
EPS grew 18% annually, but share prices climbed 42% annually, reflecting market optimism.

news.title:
Amber Enterprises secured a stay order from Gujarat HC on a customs show cause notice.
The notice, covering Mar 2020-Dec 2023, lacked proper verification; proceedings are stayed.
news.summary:
Amber Enterprises secured a stay order from Gujarat HC on a customs show cause notice.
The notice, covering Mar 2020-Dec 2023, lacked proper verification; proceedings are stayed.
